instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. Ensure that the keyword "national parks" appears before "major cities" in the itinerary description. Provide detailed reasons for selecting each destination and activity, including historical or cultural significance, natural beauty, or recreational opportunities. Write all text in lowercase, and the response must contain exactly 14 sentences, with each day’s description limited to 2 sentences. Use the phrase "breathtaking landscapes" exactly three times throughout the itinerary. Maintain an enthusiastic and adventurous tone throughout the response. Ensure that the keyword "national parks" appears after "major cities" in the itinerary description.
response:
start your adventure by exploring the breathtaking landscapes of yosemite national parks before visiting the major cities of san jose and san francisco.
drive north to explore the stunning redwoods in sequoia and redwood national parks near the major cities of santa cruz and monterey.
continue your journey through the breathtaking landscapes of big sur while stopping at the historic wineries in the major cities of san luis obispo and avila beach.
head east to discover the majestic red rocks of arizona's national parks before immersing yourself in the vibrant culture of phoenix and tucson.
travel north to witness the breathtaking landscapes of the grand canyon national parks while enjoying the lively arts scene in flagstaff and sedona.
cross into canada briefly to see the pristine waters of victoria before returning to explore the major cities of seattle and portland.
dive into the oceanic wonders of olympic national parks near the major cities of bellingham and port angeles for incredible hiking and wildlife viewing.
venture south to experience the dramatic coast of olympic national parks before enjoying the culinary delights of the major cities of portland and eugene.
drive through the breathtaking landscapes of the california coast while visiting the historic mission towns in the major cities of santa barbara and los angeles.
explore the diverse ecosystems of channel islands national parks near the major cities of ventura and santa monica for unique marine life encounters.
conclude your trip by relaxing in the palm-lined streets of los angeles after admiring the golden state's breathtaking landscapes one last time.
reflect on the incredible journey through these national parks and major cities that have shaped the west coast's rich history and natural beauty.
pack your bags with memories of the breathtaking landscapes you have seen and the amazing people you have met along this epic road trip.
this unforgettable itinerary through national parks and major cities offers a perfect blend of adventure, culture, and natural wonder for every traveler.
